title: Review: idiomatic API redesign jqa.1-5
notes:
Maintainer risk: LOW — no security surface, no new wire format, no behavior change. Two missing #[non_exhaustive] annotations are a breaking-change risk on future spec additions but not a runtime bug.
Confidence: 5% chance of missed bug. Uncertainty driven by: lifetime complexity in chat_create's let create_obj; uninitialized pattern, and the resolve_client_id lifetime tying. Would raise confidence if: runtime test against a real JMAP server exercised the new chat_create paths.
